The notebook has a magnetic closure decorated with an elegant silver plated metal clasp. Contains 192 lined pages of 70gr paper. Packed in a gift box and comes with a certificate of authenticity.

name: Notebook & ballpoint pen set
summary: Luxury Pierre Cardin set of notebook and DENISE ballpoint pen. The notebook is designed in black colour and contains 160 lined pages of 80 gr paper and a textile bookmark with a metal pendant with the Pierre Cardin lo...
descriptionLong: Luxury Pierre Cardin set of notebook and DENISE ballpoint pen. The notebook is designed in black colour and contains 160 lined pages of 80 gr paper and a textile bookmark with a metal pendant with the Pierre Cardin logo. The back of the notebook is embossed with the Pierre Cardin logo. The metal ballpoint pen has a rotating mechanism and the lower part of the pen is decorated in a structural design. It contains a quality blue refill with a 1 mm tip. Packed in a gift box, comes with a certificate of authenticity.
